releaseNotes:
SariScan Mobile v1.0.3 (Latest Release) — Offline AI Shelf Scanner & Instant Inventory Exporter.
• Always-Active Full-Frame OCR Resolution fallback on Snap & Audit
• Multi-Tier FTS5 Keyword Matching (561+ Philippine Master Catalog Items)
• 100% Offline YOLOv8 + MLKit OCR Engine
• Sub-millisecond SQLite FTS5 Search
• In-App OTA Auto-Updater Engine
